field_changes.previous: A family relationship between the two Faragas is a plausible inference from the ~23-year age gap and shared cluster, but is NOT_FOUND in any public source — not asserted as fact.

field_changes.current: Mixed observation with a family-relationship inference, and materially understated the history: the primary record shows Petr Faraga was a 2012 co-founder and jednatel until 2020. Split into observation + assessment 2026-07-18.
